member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization
member.summary:
STJ-based serialization helpers for the out-of-process connector wire protocol. The connector writes a marker-delimited JSON block to stdout:
>>>>>>>>>> { ... } <<<<<<<<<<
This class is the single source of truth for the markers; the connector exe uses the same constants when writing, and the server-side launcher uses this class when reading.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.StartMarker
member.summary: Gets or sets the start marker.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.EndMarker
member.summary: Gets or sets the end marker.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.DeserializeObjectWithMarker``1(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the JSON payload delimited by / from and deserializes it as . Returns when the markers cannot be found or parsing fails.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.SerializeAndMark(System.Object)
member.summary: Serializes as camelCase JSON, wrapped in start/end markers.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.WriteOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the write options.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Connector.Models.ConnectorJsonSerialization.ReadOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the read options.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.IsExternalInit
member.summary: Polyfill for the init keyword on target frameworks that do not natively support it. Required because the Connector.Models library targets netstandard2.0.
